prompt: Customize the CardAvatar Remotion component by setting the display name, title, avatar border color, avatar background color, avatar initials color, title color, and avatar spring stiffness while preserving the circular avatar layout and automatic initials generation.

propsSchema.name: avatarBorderColor
propsSchema.description: CSS color for the avatar border.

propsSchema.name: avatarBackgroundColor
propsSchema.description: CSS color for the avatar circle background.

propsSchema.name: avatarTextColor
propsSchema.description: CSS color for the avatar initials.

propsSchema.name: titleColor
propsSchema.description: CSS color for the title text.

propsSchema.name: avatarStiffness
propsSchema.description: Spring stiffness for the avatar pop-in animation.

migration.blockedReason: External media availability is pending because real upload credentials are not configured for assets.remotionhub.ai.
